rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are declared or visible in the same annex scope.
Resolve type mismatches in AGREE expressions by aligning helper declarations with the types of their assigned values.
generic_rules: When generating AGREE contracts, validate that all referenced identifiers are properly declared or accessible in the current scope.
Ensure type consistency in AGREE equations and constants by matching declared types with expression results.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use only visible AADL features or helper declarations within the same annex for AGREE expressions.
anti_patterns: Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers in AGREE that are not present in the model's configured dependencies.
Do not add architecture elements to fix AGREE diagnostics unless the root cause is resolved.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Component type vs implementation scope placement
AGREE annex placement and binding rules
